column12: Attn formula: model_dim * (head_dim * num_heads + head_dim * num_kv_heads) + head_dim*num_heads*model_dim + bias + qk_norm
"flame-moe" refers to model size array from the paper, but architecture is matches QWEN3. Changes to flame-moe: omit shared experts and standard dense input layer
